description: Semicircular half-pipe trough centered at the origin, opening upward, with an outer radius of 25mm, inner radius of 22mm, and length of 70mm along the Y-axis.
notes: The cross-section is a half-ring in the XZ plane. Since it opens upward and is centered at the origin, the center of the arc profile should be at (0,0,0), meaning the trough spans X from -25 to +25, Y from -35 to +35, and Z from -25 to 0.
